<!-- indicator: fig-educat-need-improv -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-educat-need-improv
#| fig-cap: 'Education Priorities the Need Improvement'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Education Priorities the Need Improvement.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-educat-need-improv", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
